deck.notes: This eval's primary artifact is the refined session handoff, not a PPTX export.

session.notes: Refined browser session with 10 slides, 3 sections, 30 semantic annotations, and 2 concepts. Baseline copy preserved at artifacts/session_baseline.velocity.

scores.notes: Session state remained coherent across import, refinement, and re-export on sleep.sav.
The MCP-authored EVAL-01 session was a valid browser baseline and closed the intended handoff loop.
Semantic annotations and concepts now survive browser re-export, but the browser still lacks a clear semantic inspection surface.
Browser import, additive refinement, and re-export all worked, though the import still raised adjustment diagnostics.
The refined session is a reviewable, portable artifact with one new slide and a persisted reorder.
The product surfaced import adjustments but did not explain their cause or make semantic state inspectable.
The brief kept the handoff task tightly scoped and made the required refinements straightforward to validate.

notableFindings: The browser imported the EVAL-01 baseline session and re-exported a refined session with 10 slides and 3 sections.
A browser-session blocker fix was required so the refined export preserved the semantic block rather than dropping it.
The refined session retained all 30 semantic annotations and both concepts from the baseline artifact.
The controlled refinements persisted: retitled lead slide, reordered daytime sleepiness ahead of energy, and added a problem-by-sex follow-up slide.
blockers: Before this run's fix, the browser session export path silently dropped semantic annotations and concepts.
Importing the exact sleep.sav baseline still reported 4 unresolved variables and 4 removed variable sets.
followUps: Trace and eliminate the unresolved-variable / dropped-variable-set diagnostics on exact-match imports.
Expose semantic annotations and concepts in an inspectable browser UI after session import.
Add targeted browser-path test coverage for session import, refinement, and re-export.
